Coding Projects

Discord Bot

A Discord bot framework written in Python with support for token authentication, YAML configuration, databases, and custom plugins

  • Audio playback from YouTube, Urban Dictionary lookup, Markov chain text generation, and role-based access control

Enheduanna

Command-line utility for composing, structuring, and improving Markdown notes that monitors daily activities and documentation

DapperTable

Manages lengthy text outputs for chatbots by dividing content into smaller segments to work around API character limits while maintaining table formatting

Hathor Podcast Manager

Download and manage media from RSS feeds and YouTube channels with SQLite database storage and customizable plugins

Backup Tool

Encrypts and archives local files to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Object Storage using AES encryption with password-protected keys

Public Transit

Retrieves arrival forecasts for AC Transit, BART, and SF-Muni with wrapper scripts for frequently accessed routes
